details.address: 378 Technology Center Way, Rock Hill, SC 29730

raw_data.address: 378 Technology Center Way, Rock Hill, SC 29730
raw_data.name: Mug & Maple

posts.body:
We now have cookies at our Rock Hill Cafe!

What is better than amazing coffee and a delicious cookie??
Coffee in rock Hill has gotten a fresh look!
We are OPEN! Soft opening with a limited food menu through May 1!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Valerie! Look forward to seeing you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: A great experience

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Liam! So happy you enjoyed the space and coffee! See you soon😁
reviews_data.review_text: Mug & Maple makes you feel right at home. The food is so good you’ll  think your Mom made it. The coffee brings you to a small town in Italy, perfectly made. The welcoming staff, cozy decor, and locally sourced honey, coffee, and artwork make it a “must see” for anyone in the Rock Hill area

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Emma! You are too good to us!😁
reviews_data.review_text: Mug and maple has some of the best local coffee and breakfast in Rockhill. I’ve been unable to pick just one drink as my favorite as ALL of their drinks are great. Their matcha is first I’ve genuinely enjoyed, and their natural sweeteners are perfect. 10/10 I’d recommend them :)

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Cynthia thank you so much! We are grateful for yall coming down to see us!

Look forward to the next time😁

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: The owners are fantastic! We leave 45 mins away and we drive all the way over to this coffee shop. The og maple is my favorite and my husband loves the honey ice coffee. They had a fun scavenger hunt and my son had a blast! And don’t even get me started on the food! The chef personally checked on us and even gave away a few secrets to their breakfast items. I will be coming back over and over again!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Damon! So happy you came through our shop😁
reviews_data.review_text: Found this nice spot during the york coffee tour and fell in love immediately. Easily in the top 5 of the tour and its brand new, so hats off to this establishment. Food and coffee taste amazing 👏.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Rion! Loved having you stop by😁
reviews_data.review_text: Imagine a barkeep crossed with a barista. That's Nate. Ready and willing to have a conversation if you want, make you a drink with flair, and no matter how ya are, it's nice to know that everybody knows your name (and how to spell it, more than likely).

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for coming in! I’m glad you had a great experience😁 hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is a new gem in Rock Hill! I got a hot Honey Beean latte (honey + vanilla), and it was perfect. The barista was super welcoming, and there were tons of seating options and big windows for lots of natural light. They are very intentional about clean, quality ingredients in both drinks and food. They also have been doing lots of fun specials for free drinks, like hiding keychains, rolling di, and social media promos! Definitely will be frequenting this spot 🌟🌺

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Derra😁

review_questions.Parking options: Free street parking, Free parking garage

reviews_data.review_text: The best food and the best coffee. Plenty of indoor and outdoor seating with a dog friendly patio.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Phil! Look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Fantastic coffee offerings, and great service in a unique space.  Will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Never seen anyone roll a 6 more😂 thank you so much!
reviews_data.review_text:
Best coffee around!! Love the vibe and atmosphere!
Roll the dice for a free coffee!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Jen😁😁
reviews_data.review_text: What a great spot - you can sit on one of the couches and read a book, or work on a puzzle, so cozy.  The coffee is top notch and the food was delicious.  Will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kris😁
reviews_data.review_text: Mug and Maple is a great place! Warm and welcoming environment! Great food and amazing coffee! I found my new daily coffee place!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Joel! Looking forward to seeing you here more often😁

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: The OG Maple Latte was amazing and they have a great space to sit down and drink coffee while working.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Euvy!!
reviews_data.review_text: Hands down one of the best egg sandwiches in town. Amazing coffee too. Cant go wrong with the OG Maple Latte and their version of the cold brew.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Sharyn😊
reviews_data.review_text: Such a great spot for coffee. Love the atmosphere!

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy you liked it!!
reviews_data.review_text: Literally best coffee I have ever had. Not Close. Place is super cute and cozy. Easy to park at for a few hours to work.
